raw_response:
Agreeing with agent1's initial assessment seems reasonable because the primary goal of the reverse bevel incision appears to focus on preventing atraumatic reflection of the gingival margin rather than solely removing infected tissue or accessing deep anatomical structures. While other functions may occur incidentally due to proper execution, they do not define the main objective of this technique.
